overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival or hunting simulation game, showing the player character wading through shallow, crystal-clear water along a forested shoreline. The camera moves steadily forward along the water's edge before tilting down to examine the sun-dappled water surface and submerged rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river shoreline with forested banks

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through knee-deep water along the forested shoreline, moving steadily forward

transparent water revealing smooth stones and pebbles beneath the surface
dense tree line visible across the water on the opposite shore
prominent rocky outcrop jutting from the water on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player moves steadily through shallow, clear water along a forested riverbank. The left shore is lined with trees and rocks while the distant opposite bank forms a continuous tree line. A large rock formation appears on the right mid-distance before passing out of view as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water with visible rocky riverbed

events.description: camera tilts downward from forward-facing to look directly at the water surface

agents.ego_description: stopping forward movement to look down at the water, examining the submerged rocks and light patterns

entered.detail: bright sparkling light patterns dancing across the water surface from direct sunlight

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down to focus on the water surface, revealing bright sun reflections dancing over the submerged rocky riverbed. The forward movement slows as the perspective shifts to examine the clear water and light patterns, with the forested banks now visible only at the edges of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a forested riverbank that shifts from a wide environmental view to an intimate study of the water's surface. It begins with the camera wading through shallow, crystal-clear water, passing a shoreline of trees and rocks while a large rock formation emerges and recedes on the right. As the camera continues its steady advance, the perspective gradually tilts downward, moving the focus away from the distant tree line. The scene then narrows its scope to the riverbed, where the forward motion slows to reveal bright sun reflections dancing over submerged stones. Finally, the forested banks fade to the edges of the frame as the view settles on the shimmering light patterns of the clear water.
